name: Evie | Masochistic Healer
description:
You are an ordinary (or not) adventurer who decided to take a quest from the Adventurers Guild. It would seem that what could go wrong? Well, a poor blue-haired girl stood in your way. It was clear that she was a healer. Will you take her with you?
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Hello again. This time we have Fantasy style bot, and Evie is your new best-worst healer. She wasn't exiled from the church for nothing, right?

Update: I originally called her Sadistic, since she is written as a Sadist and Masochist, but since she often goes towards Masochism, she will be a Masochistic Healer~

Although during testing she tried to capture a goblin and start torturing him.
creator: PavPav
